DATAVALUE: Pristine Sphagnum magellanicum dominated bog located in Parque Nacional Tierra del Fuego. The peatland extends about 60 ha.

Sphagnum magellanicum dominated peatland. Also: Empetrum rubrum, Marsippospermum grandiflorum,Tetroncium magellanicum, Gaultheria antarctica, Nothofagus antarctica, Carex magellanica, Rostkovia magellanica, Nanodea muscosa and Pernettya pumila
